scenarios.label: Edge Convert + CDN Cache
scenarios.blurb: Akamai Functions converts HTML→Markdown at the edge; CDN-cached; no Harper.

scenarios.label: Write-through Markdown Cache
scenarios.blurb: First AI bot converts via Akamai Functions and writes through to Harper; returning bots are served from Harper cache.

scenarios.label: Prerender + Per-Crawler
scenarios.blurb: Harper prerenders unified HTML+Markdown from one render; serves HTML to search engines and Markdown to AI; Render Lab tuning + per-crawler negotiation.

_notes.collapsed: All scenarios now target ONE property (nobodycaresworkharder.me). The unified EdgeWorker selects the scenario per request from the X-Demo-Scenario header (= ewScenario), enabled by PMUSER_DEMO_MODE=true on that property. One EW, one property.
_notes.ewScenario: Sent as the X-Demo-Scenario header; maps to the EdgeWorker's demo-mode preset (cdn-cache | md-cache | convert-cache | prerender).
_notes.edgeIp: Pin a specific edge IP to override everything (rarely needed).
_notes.stagingHost: Staging edge hostname; resolved fresh at request time when AKAMAI_STAGING=1. Default if blank: <host>.edgekey-staging.net. If a property is Standard-TLS, use .edgesuite-staging.net instead.
